My Big Fat Greek Wedding 2 (2016)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $59,689,605Details
International Box Office $32,406,953
Worldwide Box Office $92,096,558
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $8,551,815
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $5,560,936
Total $14,112,751
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A Portokalos family secret will bring the family back together for an even bigger and Greeker wedding.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$17,861,950 (29.9% of total gross)
Legs:3.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:64.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$18,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,133 opening theaters/3,179 max. theaters, 5.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $82,530,363

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 25th, 2016 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: March 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Norway)
March 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Mexico)
March 23rd, 2016 (Wide) (Spain)
March 24th, 2016 (Wide) (Hungary)
March 24th, 2016 (Wide) (Switzerland)
Video Release: June 7th, 2016 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for some suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2407 (Cert #50215), 1/13/2016)
Running Time: 94 minutes
Franchise: My Big Fat Greek Wedding
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel
Plot point: Relationships Gone Wrong
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Universal Pictures, Gold Circle Entertainment, HBO Films, Playtone
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
